items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis performs poorly when fighting off his back.
Conor McGregor's best path to victory against Max Holloway is within the first two rounds.
items.quote: I think Conor McGregor's best chance to win this fight is early first two rounds.

items.claim: Max Holloway will be powerful at the welterweight limit.
items.quote: I think Max Holloway is going to be pretty powerful.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's timing is an unknown factor coming into this fight.
items.quote: We don't know where Connor's timing is going to be at.
